rawAssistant: As you prepare to depart, remember to inspect your lanterns once more. The last gale must have loosened some of the straps; it'd be a shame for them to blow away again in the morning's wind. And while you're at it, take a glance at Gremlin's claws – they might've picked up any signs on that one roadside that caught your eye earlier.
